tasks.subject: Install missing packages (wlsunset, dimland, wlr-dpms, fcitx5)
tasks.description: Cannot install packages (no sudo in container). User needs to run: sudo pacman -S wlsunset dimland wlr-dpms fcitx5 fcitx5-gtk fcitx5-qt fcitx5-configtool

tasks.subject: Fix xfce-polkit path in autostart.sh
tasks.description: xfce-polkit is not at /usr/lib/xfce-polkit/xfce-polkit. Find the correct polkit agent path and update autostart.sh.

tasks.subject: Fix QT_QPA_PLATFORM case in env.conf
tasks.description: Change QT_QPA_PLATFORM from Wayland;xcb to wayland;xcb in env.conf
